title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BlinkIt - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BlinkIt - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the BlinkIt family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BlinkIt:
BlinkIt is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BlinkIt!
